title: Funtime Spinning Popping Pals Toy
features: Press and watch the colourful balls wiz around
All safely contained in sturdy plastic
description: Product Description Fantastic spinning popping pals this would make a fabulous addition to any toddler's toys. it's easy to play with even for the little hands, simply press down gently on the big blue button and watch the friendly faces on coloured balls spinning, popping, revolving and tumbling. all safely contained in sturdy plastic. it's 20cm high and suitable for 6 months+. Directions Press down gently on the big blue button to watch the colorful balls spin, pop, revolve, and tumble.

specifications_table.Set Name: Multiple spinning tops with different designs
